metaData.Ingredients: Water, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Dimethiconol, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Chloride, Perfume, Sodium Benzoate, Citric Acid, Carbomer, TEA-Dodecylbenzenesulfonate, Amodimethicone, Glycol Distearate, Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride, PEG-45M, Cyclotetrasiloxane, Trideceth-10, Disodium EDTA, Cocamide MEA, Phenoxyethanol, Mica, Trideceth-12, Cetrimonium Chloride, Cyclopentasiloxane, Titanium Dioxide, Dimethyl Palmitamine, Glycerin, Acetic Acid, Silica, Sodium Hyroxide, Lysine HCl, Salvia Hispanica Seed Oil, Tocopheryl Acetate, Iodopropynyl Butylcarbamate, BHT
metaData.Key Information: Due to its special professionally quality formulation of chia seeds and amino-vitamin, hair loss and thinning is significantly reduced. It also promotes stronger thicker hair growth and provides essential nutrients for the hair.
metaData.Preparation:
• Pre-Wash:
1. Gently brush to detangle hair before washing
2. Rinse thoroughly with warm water and do a light scalp massage to remove dirt and grease before shampoo (Allows quicker lathering of shampoo as well)
• Shampoo:
1. Apply to wet hair, gentle massage to work into a lather and rinse thoroughly
2. Lightly squeeze the shampoo from roots to ends and rinse thoroughly
3. Rinse well
• Condition:
1. Squeeze conditioner into your palm and rub hands together to help distribute evenly
2. Apply conditioner to wet hair from mid-lengths to ends, leave for 2 minutes -3 minutes and rinse well
3. Follow with hair mask and rinse completely
• Styling:
1. Rinse completely, be extremely gentle when towel-drying to reduce damage caused by friction
2. Finish by styling with your favourite TRESemmé products
• Note:
1. For protection from heat styling tools, use keratin smooth heat protect hair spray before you style
• Caution:
1. Avoid contact with eyes
2. In case of contact with eyes, rinse thoroughly with water

metaData.Ingredients: Water, Disodium C12-14 Pareth-2 Sulfosuccinate, Lauramide Dea, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Methyl Cocoyl Taurate, Dipropylene Glycol, Prunus Domestica Seed Extract, Echinacea Purpurea Root Extract, Rosa Canina Fruit Extract, Vitis Vinifera (Grape) Leaf Extract, Juglans Regia (Walnut) Seedcoat Extract, Ficus Carica (Fig) Fruit/ Leaf Extract, Foeniculum Vulgare (Fennel) Fruit Extract, Althaea Officinalis Root Extract, Chamomilla Recutita (Matricaria) Flower Extract, Carbena Benedicta Extract, Salvia Officinalis (Sage) Leaf Extract, Thymus Vulgaris (Thyme) Flower/ Leaf Extract, Rosa Damascena Flower Extract, Calendula Officinalis Flower Extract, Artemisia Absinthium Extract, Lavandula Angustifolia (Lavender) Flower Extract, Rosmarinus Officinalis (Rosemary) Leaf Extract, Polyquaternium-10, Carthamus Tinctorius (Hybrid Safflower) Seed Oil, Argania Spinosa Kernel Oil, Lupinus Albus Seed Oil, Mangifera Indica (Mango) Seed Oil, Theobroma Grandiflorum Seed Butter, Adansonia Digitata Seed Oil, Carapa Guaianensis Seed Oil, Sclerocarya Birrea Seed Oil, Sodium Chloride, Butylene Glycol Laurate, PPG-2 Cocomide, Tea-cocoyl Alaninate, Tea-cocoyl Glutamate, Argan Oil Polyglyceryl-6 Esters, Shea Butteramidopropyl Betaine, Polysorbate 20, PEG-150 Distearate, Butylene Glycol, Glycerin, Citric Acid, Sodium Hydroxide, Tocopherol, Disodium EDTA, Sodium Benzoate, Phenoxyethanol, Fragrance, Lavandula Angustifolia (Lavender) Oil, Caramel
metaData.Key Information: It has Moroccan argan oil that is safe and gentle as it deeply cleanses without stripping off the hair's natural moisture and shea butter that provides healing and anti-inflammatory properties, allowing it to be suitable for senstive scalp to use. This formula contains organic lavender and healing herbal extracts that effectively restores and reinvigorate weakened hair and scalp for soft and healthy hair. The uplifting blend of calming lavender and berries eliminates nervous tension from everyday stress, improving sleep quality and leaves hair with a lingering soothing scent. This shampoo also contains no added silicones, sulphates, parabans nor artificial colourants.
metaData.Preparation:
• Directions:
1. Thorughly wet the scalp and hair with water
2. Pump 1 - 2 times and apply evenly on to hair
3. Massage into a rich lather and rinse off thoroughly
4. Use together use Moist Diane Botanical Organic Lavender Treatment for best results
• Caution:
1. Avoid contact with eyes
2. If it does, rinse out immediately
3. Do not use when your scalp is red, inflamed, infected, irrtated or painful
4. Should you experience signs of skin redness, swelling, itchiness or irritation, discontinue use immediately and consult a dermatologist
metaData.Storage Information:
• Keep out of reach of children
• Store in a cool place

product.description:
• Avoid contact with eyes. If contact occurs, rinse eyes immediately with cold or lukewarm water.
• If any irritation occurs, stop use and consult a doctor
• Not to be used for children under three years old.
• Do not let water enter the container when using. After use, please close the cap.

metaData.Key Information:
• Bond Restore Technology
Formulated with a blend of Seaweed extracts to protect and smoothen hair cuticles, reducing hair friction by 33% to minimise breakage.^
• Scalp Care Complex
Formulated with Japanese Citrus Unshiu Peel extract known to help hair loss problems and scalp care complex provides hydration to hair. 92% of consumers reported no scalp itchiness during use.^^
• Camellia Oil Force
Powered by Tsubaki’s signature ingredient to deeply moisturise, repair damage, reduce frizz and breakage, and hydrate the scalp for healthier hair and scalp.
•Damage-Sensor Technology
Detects and attaches to damaged areas of the hair to deliver repairing effect.

*Due to hair breakage. Based on Instrumental Evaluation on hair tress, Feb 2024.
**Based on consumer test , 63 respondents (HairFall SP), 62 respondents (HairFall TM), China, Feb-Mar 2024.

^Based on third-party instrumental test, China, Mar 2024.
^^Based on consumer tests, 63 respondents, China, Feb-Mar. 2024.
metaData.Preparation:
• Hold cap and turn nozzle in to unlock the pump, push pump a few times until shampoo is dispensed
• Take an adequate amount of shampoo and gently massage onto wet hair and scalp using finger pads.
• Rinse hair thoroughly with water.
